title: Cobblemon Move Inspector Forge (MuddyPort)
description: A Forge port of Starlotte's Cobblemon Move Inspector for 1.20.1
body:
**Cobblemon Move Inspector (Forge)**
Forge port of Starlotte's Cobblemon Move Inspector for Minecraft 1.20.1. All credit to Starlotte for the original mod!

Original description: "Tiny clientside Cobblemon addon that adds a tooltip description to moves in battles with the move description, stats, and type matchup"; because I also refuse to actually learn how the game works (:

**Features:**

Hover over moves in battle to see description, power, accuracy, effect chance, and type effectiveness against the opponent.
**NEW!** Hover over moves in the Summary screen (Cobblemon menu > Moves tab) to see description and stats.

Should still have support for custom types.

Original by Starlotte at: [https://modrinth.com/mod/cobblemon-move-inspector](https://modrinth.com/mod/cobblemon-move-inspector)
